name: Recipe 4 — Atomic handoff (timeout, synthetic)
comment: Alice yields with bob as the nominated recipient but bob never signs recipe_handoff_resume. After the 200-block NEP-519 budget elapses, the same callback receipt fires — this time with Err(PromiseError) — and its Err arm runs Promise::new(alice).transfer(amount). Funds come home to alice. The receipt was always going to resolve within 200 blocks; bob's silence just routed it to the Err arm.

events.title: Recipe 4 — timeout branch
events.body: same contract as the claim scene, different ending. alice yields with bob nominated. bob never signs anything. the 200-block budget ticks down. the callback fires anyway — this time with PromiseError — and refunds alice.

events.title: tx1 — alice yields with 0.01 NEAR attached
events.body: recipe_handoff_yield(name, to=bob). same as the claim scene: deposit received, callback scheduled, waiting.

events.title: waiting — bob never claims
events.body: blocks pass. bob is on stage but signs nothing. the callback receipt is still scheduled, prepaid gas still locked, NEP-519's 200-block budget ticking — watch the numeral drain.

events.title: budget exhausted — refund
events.body: at yield + 200 blocks, the runtime delivers PromiseError to the already-scheduled callback. its Err arm runs Promise::new(alice).transfer(amount). the funds go home.

events.title: refunded
events.body: trace events handoff_refunded and recipe_resolved_err emitted; 0.01 NEAR landed back on alice. the same receipt that would have paid bob on a claim paid alice on the timeout. one primitive, two endings.
